name: create-cometkit-app
description: Scaffold a CometKit project: Turborepo + NestJS/Fastify + Drizzle (ULID) + Next.js, wired for the Comet spec-driven agent workflow on Claude Code and Google Antigravity.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const f='dist/index.js';const fs=require('fs');const s=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8');if(!s.startsWith('#!'))fs.writeFileSync(f,'#!/usr/bin/env node\n'+s);fs.chmodSync(f,0o755)"
